title: House Armed Services Committee
text:
Full Committee Hearing: U.S. Defense Strategy and Posture
Following the release of the new National Defense Strategy, the committee will receive testimony from Under Secretary of Defense for Policy Elbridge Colby on U.S. defense policy and posture. Learn more here: https://armedservices.house.gov/calendar/eventsingle.aspx?EventID=6408
RDY Hearing: Energy, Installations, and Environment Update
The Readiness Subcommittee will get a programmatic update on military construction (MILCON), environmental programs, energy programs, base operations support (BOS), and facility sustainment, restoration, and modernization (FSRM) accounts. Learn more here: https://armedservices.house.gov/calendar/eventsingle.aspx?EventID=6407 Witnesses: Assistant Secretary of Defense for Energy, Installations, and Environment Department of Defense Dale Marks Assistant Secretary of the Army for Installations, Ener...
Full Committee Hearing: Speed to Scale: Revitalizing the Defense Industrial Base
The committee will receive testimony from Under Secretary of Defense for Acquisition and Sustainment Michael P. Duffey regarding efforts to revitalize the Defense Industrial Base. Learn more here: https://armedservices.house.gov/calendar/eventsingle.aspx?EventID=6406
Joint Subcommittee Hearing: Modernization of the Organic Industrial Base
Senior Army officials will testify about plans and ongoing efforts to modernize the Army’s organic industrial base. Learn more here: https://armedservices.house.gov/calendar/eventsingle.aspx?EventID=6397
Joint Subcommittee Hearing: V-22 Osprey Update
Learn more here: https://armedservices.house.gov/calendar/eventsingle.aspx?EventID=6392
Chairman Rogers Statement on FY26 NDAA Conferenced Text on House Floor
